case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. VS. CHERRY THOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $83.55 INTEREST, $26.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP.
